name: Jiangsu Chuanzhi Podcast Education Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Chuanzhi Podcast Education Technology Co., Ltd. provides IT training courses. It offers courses in the areas of JavaEE; HTML and JS+ front end; Big Data; Python and data analysis; UI/UE design; software testing; Linux cloud computing, operation, and maintenance development; UI/UE design; and E-commerce visual operation. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
